'''Myrkr''' was a [[Color/Legends|yellow-orange]] [[Star/Legends|star]] and the primary star of the [[Myrkr system/Legends|Myrkr system]].

{{Star-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''
